results.description: next-evals agent-029: use cache directive and revalidateTag profile for eventual catalog refresh

assertions.name: includes(/['"]use cache['"];?/)
assertions.group: Catalog reads use use-cache directive and products cache tag

assertions.name: includes(/cacheTag\s*\(\s*['"]products['"]\s*\)/)
assertions.group: Catalog reads use use-cache directive and products cache tag

assertions.name: isDefined(inline form-triggered Server Action exists in one file)
assertions.group: Inline form-triggered Server Action flow exists

assertions.name: isDefined(a file calls revalidateTag)
assertions.group: Server Action revalidates products using revalidateTag profile

assertions.name: includes(/import.*revalidateTag.*from\s+['"]next\/cache['"]/)
assertions.group: Server Action revalidates products using revalidateTag profile

assertions.name: includes(/revalidateTag\s*\(/)
assertions.group: Server Action revalidates products using revalidateTag profile

assertions.name: includes(/revalidateTag\s*\(\s*['"]products['"]\s*,/)
assertions.group: Server Action revalidates products using revalidateTag profile

assertions.name: excludes(/\bupdateTag\s*\(/)
assertions.group: Server Action revalidates products using revalidateTag profile
